message.content:
@startuml
actor mobile
participant "www" as www
participant "endpoint" as endpoint
participant "haproxy" as haproxy
participant "ipfs" as ipfs
participant "postgraphile" as postgraphile
participant "CITY Custom Net" as cityCustomNet
participant "logstash" as logstash
participant "dApp" as dApp
database "postgres" as postgres
database "elastic" as elastic
participant "prometheus" as prometheus
participant "kibana" as kibana

box "webUI"
  participant mobile
  participant www
end box

mobile -> www : sign & send events
note over www : browser ext or mobile wallet
www -> haproxy : HTTPS gateway & peer tcp/4001
haproxy -> ipfs : /ipfs/{CID}
haproxy -> haproxy : HTTPS (oauth by EC Address)
note over www : User makes deposit / signs entry to trigger events.

box "api - Admin/Write api"
  participant endpoint
end box

endpoint -> ipfs : /v2 - read/write factom api
endpoint -> ipfs : /ipfs/{CID} - readonly gateway
endpoint -> postgraphile : /graphql - readonly graphql queries
endpoint -> cityCustomNet : livefeed log
endpoint -> elastic : index event logs
endpoint -> elastic : dApp specific events
postgraphile -> dApp : Query/Sign
dApp -> cityCustomNet : sign and dispatch requests
endpoint -> cityCustomNet : read/write signed factom entries

box "dashboard"
  participant logstash
end box

prometheus -> kibana : dashboard query
prometheus -> prometheus : poll()
dApp -> cityCustomNet : Monitor(FA2XXXXXXXXX) Balance changes
dApp -> prometheus : HTTP GET /metrics
endpoint -> prometheus : HTTP GET /metrics
prometheus -> kibana : metrics_query
dApp -> logstash : dApp specific rollup

box "dApp - controller"
  participant dApp
end box

dApp -> cityCustomNet : dispatch on-chain event
dApp -> logstash : dApp specific logging
dApp -> ipfs : pin entry content on IPFS

@enduml
